## Checklist

- [ ] I have signed the [CLA](../CLA.md) (the bot will prompt on first PR)
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:quick` passes
- [ ] `npm run verify:arch` passes (if I touched module boundaries / imports)
- [ ] `npm run audit:ui-discipline` does not regress (if I touched frontend UI)
- [ ] No secrets, real API keys, or `.env` values are included in this diff
- [ ] No `console.log`, no `any`, no hardcoded model names, no emoji in code
